    Method
    Description
    PermissionGroup
    PermissionUser.demote(PermissionUser demoter, String ladderName)
    Deprecated.
    Prefer PermissionsEx.getApi().getLadderManager().demote(user, ladderName) (modern dev.rono.permissions.api.ladder.LadderManager).
    PermissionGroup
    PermissionManager.getGroup(String groupname)
    Deprecated.
    PermissionGroup[]
    PermissionManager.getGroups()
    Deprecated.
    prefer PermissionManager.getGroupList()
    PermissionGroup[]
    PermissionUser.getGroups()
    Deprecated.
    Use PermissionEntity.getParents() instead.
    PermissionGroup[]
    PermissionUser.getGroups(String worldName)
    Deprecated.
    Use PermissionEntity.getParents(String) instead.
    PermissionGroup
    PermissionUser.getRankLadderGroup(String ladder)
    Returns the group that places this user on the given rank ladder.
    PermissionGroup
    PermissionUser.promote(PermissionUser promoter, String ladderName)
    Deprecated.
    Prefer PermissionsEx.getApi().getLadderManager().promote(user, ladderName) (modern dev.rono.permissions.api.ladder.LadderManager).
    PermissionGroup
    PermissionManager.resetGroup(String groupName)
    Deprecated.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Map<String,List<PermissionGroup>>
    PermissionUser.getAllGroups()
    Deprecated.
    Use PermissionEntity.getAllParents() instead.
    Map<String,List<PermissionGroup>>
    PermissionGroup.getAllParentGroups()
    Deprecated.
    Use PermissionEntity.getAllParents() instead.
    Map<String,List<PermissionGroup>>
    PermissionEntity.getAllParents()
    Returns direct parent groups keyed by world name.
    List<PermissionGroup>
    PermissionGroup.getChildGroups()
    Returns groups that have this group as a direct parent in the global context.
    List<PermissionGroup>
    PermissionGroup.getChildGroups(String worldName)
    Returns groups that have this group as a direct parent in the given world context.
    List<PermissionGroup>
    PermissionManager.getDefaultGroups(String worldName)
    Deprecated.
    List<PermissionGroup>
    PermissionGroup.getDescendantGroups()
    Returns all groups below this one in the inheritance tree in the global context.
    List<PermissionGroup>
    PermissionGroup.getDescendantGroups(String worldName)
    Returns all groups below this one in the inheritance tree for the given world context.
    List<PermissionGroup>
    PermissionManager.getGroupList()
    Deprecated.
    List<PermissionGroup>
    PermissionManager.getGroups(String groupName)
    Deprecated.
    List<PermissionGroup>
    PermissionManager.getGroups(String groupName, boolean inheritance)
    Deprecated.
    List<PermissionGroup>
    PermissionManager.getGroups(String groupName, String worldName)
    Deprecated.
    List<PermissionGroup>
    PermissionManager.getGroups(String groupName, String worldName, boolean inheritance)
    Deprecated.
    List<PermissionGroup>
    PermissionEntity.getOwnParents()
    Returns parent groups assigned directly to this entity in global scope.
    List<PermissionGroup>
    PermissionEntity.getOwnParents(String world)
    Returns parent groups assigned directly to this entity for the given world.
    List<PermissionGroup>
    PermissionGroup.getParentGroups()
    Deprecated.
    Use PermissionEntity.getParents() instead.
    List<PermissionGroup>
    PermissionGroup.getParentGroups(String worldName)
    Deprecated.
    Use PermissionEntity.getParents(String) instead.
    List<PermissionGroup>
    PermissionEntity.getParents()
    Returns all parent groups that contribute to effective inheritance in global scope.
    List<PermissionGroup>
    PermissionEntity.getParents(String world)
    Returns all parent groups that contribute to this entity's effective inheritance for the given world.
    Map<Integer,PermissionGroup>
    PermissionManager.getRankLadder(String ladderName)
    Deprecated.
    Map<String,PermissionGroup>
    PermissionUser.getRankLadders()
    Returns every rank ladder this user participates in and the corresponding group for each.
    Methods in ru.tehkode.permissions with parameters of type PermissionGroup
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    PermissionUser.addGroup(PermissionGroup group)
    Adds this user to a group in the global context.
    void
    PermissionUser.addGroup(PermissionGroup group, String worldName)
    Adds this user to a group in the given world context.
    void
    PermissionGroup.addParent(PermissionGroup parent)
    Adds a direct parent group in the global context.
    void
    PermissionGroup.addParent(PermissionGroup parent, String worldName)
    Adds a direct parent group in the given world context.
    boolean
    PermissionUser.inGroup(PermissionGroup group)
    Checks whether this user belongs to the given group in any context, including inherited membership.
    boolean
    PermissionUser.inGroup(PermissionGroup group, boolean checkInheritance)
    Checks whether this user belongs to the given group in any known world or the global context.
    boolean
    PermissionUser.inGroup(PermissionGroup group, String worldName)
    Checks whether this user belongs to the given group in a world context, including inherited membership.
    boolean
    PermissionUser.inGroup(PermissionGroup group, String worldName, boolean checkInheritance)
    Checks whether this user belongs to the given group in a world context, optionally considering inherited (indirect) membership.
    boolean
    PermissionGroup.isChildOf(PermissionGroup group)
    Checks whether the given group is a direct parent of this group in the global context.
    boolean
    PermissionGroup.isChildOf(PermissionGroup group, boolean checkInheritance)
    Checks whether this group inherits from the given group in any known world or the global context.
    boolean
    PermissionGroup.isChildOf(PermissionGroup group, String worldName)
    Checks whether the given group is a direct parent of this group in a world context.
    boolean
    PermissionGroup.isChildOf(PermissionGroup group, String worldName, boolean checkInheritance)
    Checks whether this group inherits from the given group in a world context.
    void
    PermissionUser.removeGroup(PermissionGroup group)
    Removes this user's direct membership in a group across all world contexts and the global context.
    void
    PermissionUser.removeGroup(PermissionGroup group, String worldName)
    Removes this user's direct membership in a group for the given world context.
    void
    PermissionGroup.removeParent(PermissionGroup parent)
    Removes a direct parent group in the global context.
    void
    PermissionGroup.removeParent(PermissionGroup parent, String worldName)
    Removes a direct parent group in the given world context.
    void
    PermissionUser.setGroups(PermissionGroup[] parentGroups)
    Deprecated.
    Use PermissionEntity.setParents(List) instead.
    void
    PermissionUser.setGroups(PermissionGroup[] parentGroups, String worldName)
    Deprecated.
    Use PermissionEntity.setParents(List, String) instead.
    Method parameters in ru.tehkode.permissions with type arguments of type PermissionGroup
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    PermissionGroup.setParentGroupObjects(List<PermissionGroup> parentGroups)
    Deprecated.
    Use PermissionEntity.setParents(List) instead.
    void
    PermissionGroup.setParentGroupObjects(List<PermissionGroup> parentGroups, String worldName)
    Deprecated.
    Use PermissionEntity.setParents(List, String) instead.
    void
    PermissionEntity.setParents(List<PermissionGroup> parents)
    Replaces the direct parent group list in global scope.
    void
    PermissionEntity.setParents(List<PermissionGroup> parents, String world)
    Replaces the direct parent group list for the given world.
